sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 84:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 84:1
items.html: First, the coupling was made as the looking of the Einayim of AVI on the dot, and that coupling is named after Abba. Afterwards, the screen was refined, and there was a coupling on the Vav that Ima took. (Ibid.)
